title: OneSpear
description: Limits Spears on your server to only one
body:
# OneSpear

Just like OneMace but for Spears and has a few more options:
1. You can remove the normal spear recipe so you can add a custom one
2. Let's you add a custom recipe for the spear

# CONFIG:

```
crafted: false
remove_normal_spear_recipes: false

messages:
  craft: "&d%player% has crafted the only Spear"
  already_crafted: "&cSomeone has already crafted the only Spear on this SMP"


custom_spear-recipe:
  enabled: false
  spear: NETHERITE_SPEAR
  shape:
    - "  N"
    - " S "
    - "S  "
  ingredients:
    N: NETHERITE_INGOT
    S: STICK
```


```
/onespear status (checks if its crafted or not)
/onespear set <true/false>
```
